info.title: Themiify
info.author: Fangal
info.description: Wii U Theme Installer and Manager
info.details: Themiify is a homebrew application that allows for on the fly installation of Wii U Menu themes via the Themezer API or via .utheme files placed on an SD Card. Once a theme is installed StyleMiiU will read the theme and show it the next time the Wii U Menu is loaded.
